  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Compliance and Biometric Officer",
  "description": "Dangote Group is one of Nigeria&rsquo;s most diversified business conglomerates with a hard &ndash; earned reputation for excellent business practices and products&rsquo; quality with its operational headquarters in the bustling metropolis of Lagos, Nigeria in West Africa.

We are&nbsp;&nbsp;recruiting to fill the position below:

&nbsp;Job Position: Compliance and Biometric Officer&nbsp;

Job Location: NASCON - HO, NASCON - HO

Job Summary


	Responsible for monitoring driver safety compliance, managing biometric driver verification, reviewing AI camera alerts, enforcing fleet safety policies and supporting corrective actions to reduce operational risks and improve driver accountability.&nbsp;


&nbsp;Job Responsibilities


	Monitor and review AI camera safety alerts during assigned shift, including seat belt violation, distracted driving, phone usage, fatigue/drowsiness, smoking, camera obstruction/tampering, and other unsafe driving behaviours.
	Ensure all drivers are biometrically captured and verified before employment to confirm identity, prevent impersonation, and strengthen compliance with recruitment and fleet safety requirements.
	Validate AI camera alerts using available evidence and classify each alert as valid, false, pending review, repeated offence, or critical incident.
	Monitor compliance with company policies, SOPs, and control procedures.
	Monitor and report overspeed violations.
	Follow up on corrective actions such as driver warning, retraining, counselling, or disciplinary recommendation.
	Identify repeat offenders, high-risk drivers, high-risk routes, frequent violation types, and control weaknesses from shift data.
	Any other function as maybe assigned by Management.


Qualification and Experience


	B.SC or HND in Computer science or related field with 2 - 4 years of working experience in related industry.
	Strong analytical and investigation skills.
	Good documentation and reporting ability.


Competencies Requiements


	Strong interpersonal and teamwork skills and excellent attention to details.
	Integrity and confidentiality.
	Ability to challenge non-compliance professionally.
	Ability to&nbsp;&nbsp;work and execute assigned tasks excellently with minimal supervision.

Compliance and Biometric Officer Job at Dangote Group




        
    

        
        Dangote Group is one of Nigeria’s most diversified business conglomerates with a hard – earned reputation for excellent business practices and products’ quality with its operational headquarters in the bustling metropolis of Lagos, Nigeria in West Africa.

We are  recruiting to fill the position below:

 Job Position: Compliance and Biometric Officer 

Job Location: NASCON - HO, NASCON - HO

Job Summary
     

            
    




	Responsible for monitoring driver safety compliance, managing biometric driver verification, reviewing AI camera alerts, enforcing fleet safety policies and supporting corrective actions to reduce operational risks and improve driver accountability. 


 Job Responsibilities


	Monitor and review AI camera safety alerts during assigned shift, including seat belt violation, distracted driving, phone usage, fatigue/drowsiness, smoking, camera obstruction/tampering, and other unsafe driving behaviours.
	Ensure all drivers are biometrically captured and verified before employment to confirm identity, prevent impersonation, and strengthen compliance with recruitment and fleet safety requirements.
	Validate AI camera alerts using available evidence and classify each alert as valid, false, pending review, repeated offence, or critical incident.
	Monitor compliance with company policies, SOPs, and control procedures.
	Monitor and report overspeed violations.
	Follow up on corrective actions such as driver warning, retraining, counselling, or disciplinary recommendation.
	Identify repeat offenders, high-risk drivers, high-risk routes, frequent violation types, and control weaknesses from shift data.
	Any other function as maybe assigned by Management.


Qualification and Experience


	B.SC or HND in Computer science or related field with 2 - 4 years of working experience in related industry.
	Strong analytical and investigation skills.
	Good documentation and reporting ability.


Competencies Requiements


	Strong interpersonal and teamwork skills and excellent attention to details.
	Integrity and confidentiality.
	Ability to challenge non-compliance professionally.
	Ability to  work and execute assigned tasks excellently with minimal supervision.
    

    

        Click here to Apply
